title: Consiliency projections index (projections.index.v1)
description: A deterministic pure-merge index of per-artifact projection manifests (+ portal_projection.v2 envelopes + refresh sidecars). Carries NO generated_at / generated_at_commit so a --check rebuild is byte-identical across source commits that touch no manifest (determinism). Per-entry pinned_commit / source_S_digest carries the meaningful provenance. The wire schema id is 'projections.index.v1' (non-namespaced, per DESIGN §2.3 — the interchangeability wire value the producer emits) while the file and loader key follow the package's hyphen/snake conventions. Entry shape is per-kind: the proj-code kinds pin a code commit (pinned_commit + facts), proj-S-certified pins a desired-state graph (source_S_digest, no code commit or facts file) — expressed with conditional requireds keyed on kind.

source_S_digest.description: The desired-state graph S digest a proj-S-certified projection pins — the neutral index field the aggregator maps from spec's graph_digest / desired_graph_digest, exactly as code_head_sha maps to pinned_commit. Required for proj-S-certified; absent for the proj-code kinds, which pin a code commit instead.

branch.description: OPTIONAL pipeline-owned contract branch this projection was generated on (DESIGN §11.1). Omitted keeps the entry a pure function of the manifest per §2.3 / §10.4 (single pin per commit; currency is a display-time comparison, not a per-branch generation matrix). Populated only when the branch is available in the generation context; never required for pure-merge determinism.

refresh_status.description: REFRESH-LAYER field (§5), NOT a manifest verdict. Merged from the committed <artifact>.refresh.json SIDECAR, never from the manifest (manifests are additionalProperties:false single-writer gate records). Absent when no sidecar exists.

display_route.description: Present for certified entries (from portal_projection.v2); null / absent otherwise.

allOf.$comment: proj-code kinds pin a code commit and carry a facts file; their maturity is capped at hash-checked (never certified).

proj-S-certified pins a desired-state graph S (source_S_digest), not a code commit; it has no facts file. maturity_label may be certified ONLY for this kind (floor realized-edge-observed when the certificate bind does not pass).
